# Public roadmap (Q2 2026 - Q1 2027)

## Q2 2026 (in progress)
- Apostrophe-safe retrieval tokenizer (shipped)
- Hybrid lexical + vector retrieval (shipped)
- Custom provider data scope toggles (shipped)
- Lexical fallback telemetry visibility (shipped)

## Q3 2026
- Q3 2026 ships first-class custom modes and Playwright E2E gating
- SOC2 Type 1 audit
- Calendar integration for post-call action items
- Pro tier price increase to $24/user/mo

## Q4 2026
- Mobile companion (read-only)
- Local Whisper diarization
- DB encryption at rest using SQLCipher
- Plugin SDK alpha for custom dynamic actions

## Q1 2027
- Enterprise tier general availability
- Shared team knowledge base
- SSO integrations
